user.title: HybridHeat – Room
user.description: One entry is one room with a single virtual climate entity (heat / cool).

confirm_ac_no_cool.title: AC has no cool mode?
confirm_ac_no_cool.description: The selected climate entity ({ac_entity}) does not list HVAC mode "cool". The virtual thermostat cannot offer cooling. Pick another AC entity or continue with heat only.

reconfigure.title: HybridHeat – Adjust room
reconfigure.description: Change room name, heating and AC climate entities, and room temperature sensor. Global settings stay under Options (or as last saved).

reconfigure_ac_no_cool.title: AC has no cool mode?
reconfigure_ac_no_cool.description: The selected climate entity ({ac_entity}) does not list HVAC mode "cool". The virtual thermostat cannot offer cooling. Pick another AC entity or continue with heat only.

globals.title: Global energy & PV inputs
globals.description: Energy prices as fixed €/kWh; outdoor temp and PV forecast from sensors. When adding another room, fields are pre-filled from the most recently added HybridHeat room (AC setpoint offset stays per-room). COP hint: EU label SCOP (average climate) near ~7 °C, e.g. -7:2.8, 0:3.6, 7:4.6, 12:5.0.

data.base_load_w: Base load in W (forecast vs consumption)
data.ac_setpoint_offset_c: AC setpoint offset (°C): added to hybrid target when heating, subtracted when cooling (e.g. indoor sensor correction, 2)

error.forecast_required: Select at least one forecast / PV sensor.
error.same_climate_entities: Heating and AC must be two different climate entities.
error.room_name_taken: This room name is already used by another HybridHeat entry.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check logs for custom_components.hybrid_heat.

abort.options_not_implemented: Options flow is not implemented yet (TODO).

init.title: Shared settings for all rooms
init.description: Most fields apply to all HybridHeat rooms. Exception: “AC setpoint offset” is saved only for the current room. COP hint: EU label SCOP (average climate) near ~7 °C.

data.base_load_w: Base load in W (forecast vs consumption)
data.ac_setpoint_offset_c: AC setpoint offset (°C): this room only; added when heating, subtracted when cooling

ac_cool_not_supported.message: The AC entity {entity_id} does not expose HVAC mode "cool". Pick a climate entity that supports cooling, or use heat/off only.
